description: CompositionBlue crew neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has short sleeves, black panel on the sides and shoulders and appliquéd branding on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsCrafted from soft polyester fabric, this jersey from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great choice to wear for your tennis practice or on casual days. Team this tee with trackpants or shorts and tennis shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during the winter.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of shoulders 18"
